CREATE TABLE transactions (id UUID, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_transactions AS SELECT transactionID() AS trans_details;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), 100.0); SELECT transactionID(); ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), 200.0); SELECT transactionID(); COMMIT;
SELECT transactionID() FROM (SELECT transactionID() AS trans FROM transactions) AS subquery;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (generateUUIDv4(), 150.0); SELECT * FROM (SELECT transactionID() AS trans FROM transactions) WHERE trans IS NOT NULL; ROLLBACK;
CREATE TABLE temp AS (SELECT transactionID() AS tid FROM (SELECT transactionID() FROM transactions)); BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT * FROM temp; ROLLBACK;
WITH (SELECT transactionID() AS trans FROM transactions) AS trans_ids BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT * FROM trans_ids; ROLLBACK;
